signals.headline: US-Iran Nuclear Deal Nears Resolution | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Nuclear Deal Nears Resolution | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY (below 2.3-2.4% consensus), driven by oil but curbed by fuel caps | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3]
